name: Cheese Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
%%%%% CHEESE PRETZELS %%%%%
Shape these nibbles into pretzels, or make sticks or rounds. You can make them up to three days ahead and store in a cookie tin. Serve at room temperature or reheat them in an oven set to 300°F for 5 minutes.
1. In a bowl, cream the butter until fluffy. Beat in the cheese and mustard.
2. Combine flour, salt, and cayenne in another bowl. Add this mixture to the butter mixture and stir just until combined, being careful not to overmix. The dough should hold together when formed into a ball.
3. Form the dough into a disc and wrap in plastic wrap. Chill for 30 minutes.
4. Divide the chilled dough into 1 tablespoon portions. Roll each portion into a 10-inch strip.
5. Twist the ends of each strip to form pretzels, then place them on a baking sheet.
6. Brush each pretzel with egg white and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
7. Bake in an oven set to 375°F for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Makes about 2 dozen pretzels.
